title: tillandsia × versaliensis
intro: Tillandsia × versaliensis, also known as the Versailles air plant, is a hybrid species of the Tillandsia genus, which is a type of epiphyte that obtains moisture and nutrients from the air rather than through a traditional root system. This air plant is native to Central and South America and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Tillandsia × versaliensis include reducing stress and anxiety, improving respiratory health, and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions and promote overall well-being.
